description: schemaVersion §A:未知 major v3+ → reject,不 commit offset(让平台/新版 SDK 兜底)。一个旧 SDK 收到未来 v3 消息必须安全拒绝而非误解析。

then.sdkExpectedAction: reject an unknown major (v3) and do NOT commit the offset
sdkMustNot: process a v3 message under v1/v2 assumptions
commit offset for a rejected message (would silently drop the task)
